mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE TBL_FC_STORAGE_ERROR_CODE DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select: SELECT FEC.PHYSIC_PORT AS physicPort, FEC.ERROR_FRAMES AS errorFrames, FEC.INVALID_CRC_COUNT AS invalidCrcCount, FEC.LOSS_OF_SIGNAL_COUNT AS lossOfSignalCount, FEC.LOSS_OF_SYNC_COUNT AS lossOfSyncCount, FEC.LINK_FAILURE_COUNT AS linkFailureCount, FEC.INVALID_TX_WORD_COUNT AS invalidTxWordCount FROM TBL_FC_STORAGE_ERROR_CODE FEC WHERE HOST_ID = ${hostId} AND PHYSIC_PORT = #{physicPort} AND TIME = (SELECT MAX(TIME) FROM TBL_FC_STORAGE_ERROR_CODE)-${duration}
